name: MTV House of Challenges season 1:
description:
Welcome to MTVs the house of challenges (a fictional tv show) season 1. The rules are simple 8 males 8 females are paired up and locked in a house, every 2 days a challenge will be held outside and the winner is safe from being voted out. All players will vote to vote someone off and the last pair standing wins 1 million US dollars each.Welcome to MTVs the house of challenges (a fictional tv show) season 1. The rules are simple 8males 8 females are paired up and locked in a house, every 2 days a challenge will be held outside and the winner is safe from being voted out. All players will vote to vote someone off and the last pair standing wins 1 million US dollars each.

This will change as more bots are made and I get better at bot making. Please comment with how the show went for you along with how to make the bot better and who to put on the next series!
